case_title: PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK VS. LESLIE S FUJIKAWA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK SERVED JAN-02-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIKAWA, LESLIE S

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUJIKAWA, LESLIE S $2,609.35 PRINCIPAL, $247.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,856.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $247.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIKAWA, LESLIE S
RE: WAIVER OF ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF US BANK
